RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
Spotlight: Lightly-raced mare; not disgraced with fifth of six in 9.5f Wolverhampton novice in May so possibilities now going into handicaps.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
OwnerName: Mrs R Coleman And G Glendining
Spotlight: A dual 7f/1m AW scorer over the winter; tongue tied and back on song with fourth of 11 in 1m Newmarket handicap 18 days ago; one to consider eased 1lb.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
Spotlight: Notched a pair of 1m AW classified events in January; back on track when second of seven in 1m Musselburgh handicap 16 days ago; not out of things.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
Spotlight: Ended a losing sequence over C&D in January; off five months and never a threat after a very slow start when seventh in 1m Nottingham handicap 13 days ago.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
Spotlight: Both his wins (1m/1m2f) have come on AW at Lingfield; failed to build on an encouraging reappearance C&D fourth when seventh in 1m Lingfield handicap in April; needs to bounce back after a break.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
OwnerName: D Gilbert, A Bruce, G Wills
Spotlight: Lightly-raced ex-Irish maiden; off eight months and not disgraced on his handicap debut with fifth of 11 at Leicester (1m2f) in May; needs to build on it here.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
Spotlight: 66-1 breakthrough winner at Bath (1m) last October but well below that form both subsequent runs, only eighth here (7f) in December; others appeal more.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div I)
Spotlight: Is 0-14 and she beat one in 1m2f AW classified event at Lingfield 20 days ago; blinkers and hood are retried here.

Enjoyed a good spell last summer and gained second career win when taking Down Royal handicap over this trip in May; just okay run off 5lb higher at Leopardstown albeit from a wide draw; remains of interest.
Got off the mark for former yard in a 6f Navan maiden last October; underwhelming so far this term for current yard although handicapper giving him a chance.

OwnerName: W Keeling & M C Grassick & Mrs M J Grassick
Spotlight: Largely consistent veteran whose seven wins range in trips from 7f to 1m4f, most recently at lower limit at the Curragh last autumn; recent Leopardstown fourth (Green Kite second) was a seasonal-best but this ground possibly on the quick side.
Prolific winner at around this trip, latest in Gowran claimer nearly a year ago; 0-9 for current yard but Down Royal second to Faoladh puts him in the mix on ground he'll handle.
Two wins this term have been at 5f (good); gelded on the back of a couple of poor runs and now tries again at this longer trip (beaten neck in 2024).
Last win came nearly two years ago (6f, good-to-firm); Curragh comeback run leaves him with a lot to find although is down to a career-low mark.
Enjoyed a successful 2025, winning three sprint handicaps; yet to hit form this term, last of 18 over C&D a week ago in first-time blinkers (now replaced by cheekpieces).

Now a 17-race maiden but several good placed efforts, including Navan second (winner has won again since), most recently here a week ago when strong-finishing fourth over 6f, having not had a clear run; this trip her limit, should go well with a clear run and Billy Lee now takes over.

Second to a clear winner in Killarney maiden last October and similar level of form on latest when chasing home a progressive sort (winner again since) over this trip in Leopardstown handicap last month; both those efforts on much softer ground, untried on ground this quick but big player if handling it, although draw a negative.
Glimpses of ability in all four maiden runs, both Curragh efforts this term when staying on late over 6f; return to 7f to suit and potential improver entering handicaps.
Never recovered from tardy start on last month's handicap debut here (6f), last of 12; tongue-tie worn then now discarded and steps up in trip.
Lightly raced 3yo whose Galway fourth was the pick of three runs last year; seasonal return for handicap debutante and possibly best watched unless market speaks.

Three turf wins include here (6f) in 2024; yet to hit form on turf this year but has taken a 14lb drop in the handicap and excuses here last week (upset in stalls, not clear run) when well-backed in an apprentice handicap; no form at this trip (from few opportunities) but not one to rule out.
Has struggled in her three handicap attempts at a mile, hard to fancy despite a reduced mark.
Nothing yet in handicaps, most recently last of 10 on AW in April when cheekpieces (now left off) tried; hard to fancy.

OwnerName: J O'Mulloy And W R Muir
Spotlight: Sole success came at Chelmsford (1m2f, AW) last October; made a positive return to action when runner-up at Leicester (1m2f, good) last month but raced too freely when upped to 1m4f at Ffos Las nine days ago; needs to settle in order to get home.

Fourth at Cork (10.5f, soft) in May in the last of three maidens for Jessica Harrington; sold for 22,000gns but beaten 52l on stable/handicap debut at Ffos Las (1m4f, good to soft) last month; best left alone at present.
Hasn't finished within 12l of the winner in five starts and has trailed in last in a couple of handicaps since headgear was introduced; difficult to fancy.
Ran his best race when beaten a nose at Ffos Las (upped to 1m4f, good) nine days ago on his handicap debut; there should be better to come and he's an obvious contender here off the same mark.

Has run some solid races in handicaps at Bath this year, latest when runner-up (1m2f, good) last month; there is a good chance that this step up in trip will eke out more improvement in the search of her first win.
0-8 but running well in defeat and crying out for a step up to this distance; serious player in bid to break her duck.
Has shown little in five runs between 6f-1m2f; steps up further in trip and hard to make a case for.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: Won last September here (7f) and at Southwell (1m; off 5lb higher than today) but yet to fire this season, only eighth of 13 in 1m Salisbury handicap 24 days ago; others are much preferred but he was strong in the initial betting for this race yesterday.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: Gained second win of 2026 at Leicester (1m) in May and has continued in good form, refitted in cheekpieces when fourth of seven at Musselburgh (1m) 16 days ago; that form has been franked so he can go well again.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: Not the most reliable and winless since March 2024 for Gemma Tutty; hinted at a revival though on just second run for his new yard with fourth of eight in 1m1f handicap at Goodwood last month; not without interest off a tumbling mark with Oisin Murphy up for the first time.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
OwnerName: Mrs R J McCreery And Richard Craddock
Spotlight: Gained a breakthrough victory over C&D last May but ended 2025 with a poor run over C&D and has fared no better in handicaps at Chepstow (7f) and Salisbury (1m) this season; not easy to make a case for.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: A two-time 7f winner last summer; in good form this season until only seventh of nine in 7f Musselburgh handicap 16 days ago; the sort to bounce back though.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: On a losing sequence but he took a step back in the right direction with seventh of 12 in 1m Carlisle handicap 23 days ago, fading only late on having raced wide; not out of things eased 2lb.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: Gained an overdue first success at Wolverhampton (8.5f) in May but failed to back it up when seventh in 1m Ffos Las handicap 34 days ago; remains handily weighted back on an artificial surface though.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: Got back on song for his new yard with third of ten in 1m Chepstow handicap 23 days ago; no forlorn hope off an easing mark.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: Notched a first success in over two years in 7f handicap at Lingfield last month; needs to back it up off a 5lb higher mark here in a change of headgear.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
OwnerName: Aura Racing, Dave Brown, Joe Lane
Spotlight: Yet to score but he arrives in decent nick, sixth of ten in 1m2f classified event at Lingfield 20 days ago; possibilities.

RaceName: Try Unibet's New Improved Acca Boosts Handicap (Div II)
Spotlight: Without a win since 2023 here and she's offered little in a trio of handicaps this season, beating one at Wolverhampton (9.5f) last time.
